attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TMP.TRANSACTION_ID
	,TMP.REFERENCE_ACCOUNT
	,TMP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
	,TMP.LAST_UPDATED_BY
	,TMP.CREATION_DATE
	,TMP.CREATED_BY
	,TMP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
	,TMP.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
	,TMP.ORGANIZATION_ID
	,TMP.TRANSACTION_DATE
	,TMP.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID
	,TMP.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID
	,TMP.TRANSACTION_VALUE
	,TMP.PRIMARY_QUANTITY
	,TMP.GL_BATCH_ID
	,TMP.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE
	,TMP.BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE
	,TMP.CONTRA_SET_ID
	,TMP.RATE_OR_AMOUNT
	,TMP.BASIS_TYPE
	,TMP.RESOURCE_ID
	,TMP.COST_ELEMENT_ID
	,TMP.ACTIVITY_ID
	,TMP.CURRENCY_CODE
	,TMP.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE
	,TMP.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE
	,TMP.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
	,TMP.REQUEST_ID
	,TMP.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
	,TMP.PROGRAM_ID
	,TMP.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
	,TMP.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID
	,TMP.REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID
	,TMP.GL_SL_LINK_ID
	,TMP.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
	,TMP.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID
	,TMP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
	,TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME
	,TMP.SS_CD
	,TMP.LEDGER_AMOUNT
	,TMP.CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
	,TMP.TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID
	,TMP.CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
	,TMP.ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
	,TMP.FULFILL_LINE_ID
FROM (
	SELECT ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.TRANSACTION_ID
		,COALESCE(ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.REFERENCE_ACCOUNT, - 1) AS REFERENCE_ACCOUNT
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.LAST_UPDATED_BY
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.CREATION_DATE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.CREATED_BY
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
		,ECP.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.ORGANIZATION_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.TRANSACTION_DATE
		,COALESCE(ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID, - 1) AS TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.TRANSACTION_VALUE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.PRIMARY_QUANTITY
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.GL_BATCH_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE
		,COALESCE(ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE, - 1) AS BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE
		,COALESCE(ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.CONTRA_SET_ID, - 1) AS CONTRA_SET_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.RATE_OR_AMOUNT
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.BASIS_TYPE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.RESOURCE_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.COST_ELEMENT_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.ACTIVITY_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.CURRENCY_CODE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.REQUEST_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.PROGRAM_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.GL_SL_LINK_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.REFRESH_DATETIME
		,'ERPCLOUD' AS SS_CD
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.LEDGER_AMOUNT
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.CST_INV_TRANSACTION_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.TRANSFER_CST_INV_TXN_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.CST_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.ORDER_LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
		,ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.FULFILL_LINE_ID
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC
	JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CBM_INV_ID_MAPPING ECI QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ECI.COMPONENT_INV_ITEM_ID ORDER BY ECI.COMPONENT_EFFECTIVITY_DATE DESC) = 1 )
	ECIIM  ON ECIIM.COMPONENT_INV_ITEM_ID = ST_CLOUD_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
	JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CBM_PRODUCTS ECP ON ECP.CLOUD_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ECIIM.CLOUD_INV_ITEM_ID
	WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >  ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CLD_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES 
         WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_ST_CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACC'  
              )
	AND 1=2
	) TMP QUALIFY RANK() OVER (
		PARTITION BY TMP.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID ORDER BY TMP.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID
			,TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC
		) = 1
